extraction.one_line_summary: HEPBURN Michael led MITCHELTON-SCOTT to TTT victory in 22:25, putting YATES Adam in GC lead 37 seconds ahead of ALAPHILIPPE Julian
tactical_patterns: MITCHELTON-SCOTT starting 16th position allowed them to calibrate pacing against JUMBO-VISMA's split times via race radio
YATES Adam gained 37 seconds on ALAPHILIPPE Julian, likely insurmountable deficit for puncheur against climber on this terrain
DECEUNINCK-QUICK STEP finished 37 seconds down despite checkpoint speed, suggesting poor pacing strategy or late-race collapse

rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: fourth across line in TTT but gained crucial 37-second buffer over main GC rival ALAPHILIPPE
rider_signals.HEPBURN Michael: positive: led team across line first, showcasing track-to-road TTT capability exceeding career expectations
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: 37-second deficit from fourth-place team finish puts him in severe tactical disadvantage for GC
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: neutral: SUNWEB third at 22 seconds, splitting JUMBO-VISMA and DECEUNINCK times suggests reasonable form
rider_signals.DURBRIDGE Luke: positive: delivered team to line in third individual position, demonstrating domestique TTT excellence
rider_signals.BOOKWALTER Brent: positive: second across line for winning team, veteran contribution to precision pacing strategy
